subject: Car Rental Confirmation — Saturday August 9 at Orlando Airport
snippet: Your car rental reservation at Orlando International Airport is confirmed for Saturday August 9.
bodyText: Rental Confirmation: Your car rental reservation is confirmed at Orlando International Airport (MCO). Pick-up: Saturday, August 9, 2026 upon arrival. Return: Friday, August 15, 2026. Vehicle: Minivan (or similar). Confirmation: ENT-5519023. Follow signs to the Enterprise counter in the MCO rental car center. Your reservation includes unlimited mileage and CDW.
